creator: daniel@blodan.se
text:
Created attachment 150126
ftp/fastdfs port

Attaching shars for ftp/fastdfs and ftp/php5-fastdfs + patches for /usr/ports/UIDs and /usr/ports/GIDs

Also attaching poudriere testport log

ftp/php5-fastdfs fails the testport because of some kind of linker error i cant figoure out, but I have tried compiling it on a fresh 10.1 install and it compiles fine without errors so there is something fishy going on with poudriere someone of you might be able to help me with?
